docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIC-MCM 839 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENJAMIN, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 839 LEVENWORTH STREET, #507, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO - ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY.***, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77049133)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN, RICHARD
